business_ideas.idea: Extract and monetize product waste/exhaust data (reservation, IoT, procurement) sold to relevant industries.
Organize and simplify government data into accessible products for enterprises to purchase.
Extend Rebel Girls book series to other underrepresented communities: Hispanic entrepreneurs, autistic scientists, etc.
Daily executive briefing email service for specific niches (pharma, legal, finance) at enterprise price points.
SaaS pricing database: collect and organize tool pricing including hidden enterprise rates, sell to product teams.
Pool pricing database by region: hire people to door-knock collect pool costs, sell leads to builders and cleaners.
College rankings alternative using graduate W-2 data to show post-graduation earnings instead of subjective criteria.
McCormick's premium competitor: differentiated spice brand with superior branding, packaging, influencer partnerships.
School of entrepreneurship: alternative to college, buy struggling campuses, teach business building to high achievers.

predictions.text: Private data becomes much more valuable as GPT/AI makes public data less useful for competitive advantage.
